Title: Training & Culture Development Manager
Place: Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
Location: Copenhagen




About the us

Xanh SM is a leading electric vehicle (EV) and sustainable mobility solutions provider headquartered in Vietnam. With a commitment to transforming urban transportation, we have successfully expanded into Global Market and are now preparing to launch operations in the EU Market.

Join us in driving the future of sustainable mobility!




Position Overview

The Training & Culture Development Manager is responsible for designing and leading comprehensive training programs and building a strong, scalable culture across both internal employees and driver partners.

This role oversees corporate training, driver training, and community culture development to ensure consistent capability building, engagement, and alignment with GSM’s values in a fast-growing mobility platform.




Key Responsibilities

1. Training & Capability Development

Design and develop structured training frameworks and learning pathways for different job levels and functions
Build and manage internal trainer (train-the-trainer) programs and ensure effective knowledge transfer
Develop and operate the Learning Management System (LMS), with a strong focus on e-learning (target ~90%)
Deliver onboarding, functional, and leadership training programs
Ensure overall governance and quality control of training and culture development activities
Develop training content for driver onboarding, product knowledge, and service skills
Execute training programs for new drivers, campaigns, new product launches, and retraining
Promote and monitor e-learning adoption among drivers based on structured learning paths
Provide support, guidance, and onboarding assistance to new drivers




2. Culture & Community Development

Design and implement internal culture-building programs, campaigns, and engagement initiatives
Organize internal communications, cultural events, and performance recognition programs
Collect feedback and propose initiatives to improve workplace environment and employee/driver engagement
Measure culture adoption and ensure alignment with company values across markets
Develop and strengthen a professional driver community for Xanh SM
Design and implement driver engagement programs tailored to each market
Organize driver events, recognition programs, and regular engagement activities
Operate internal communication channels dedicated to drivers
Gather driver insights and collaborate with relevant teams to improve driver experience




3. Global Program Management

Lead and execute large-scale training and culture initiatives across markets
Ensure consistency of training content and culture programs globally while adapting to local contexts
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Operations, HR, Marketplace) to align execution




Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Education, Business, or related fields
8–12+ years of experience in Training, Learning & Development, or Culture roles
Experience in large-scale training programs (preferably in mobility, retail, or service industries)
Strong experience in LMS, e-learning development, and training system design
Experience working with frontline workforce or driver/partner ecosystems is a strong advantage
Strong communication, program management, and stakeholder management skills
Ability to build programs from scratch in a fast-paced, high-growth environment
Fluent in English and local language.




Contact: Hai Anh Nguyen, Global Talent Acquisition Manager

Email: v.anhnth94@xanhsm.com




We appreciate your interest in this opportunity. Given the high volume of applications, we will only be able to contact shortlisted candidates. We value your understanding and patience in this process. Thank you for your interest and cooperation.

Title: DATA SCIENCE CONSULTANT COPENHAGEN
Place: Copenhagen Metropolitan Area
Description:
We are currently recruiting for our Summer 2026 intake, with an expected start date in September 2026.




Role:




Statistical data processing (Data Mining)
Artificial Intelligence (AI), including generative AI
Predictive modeling using Machine Learning and Data Science techniques
Time-series modeling (ARIMA and panel data models) and simulation models (Monte Carlo)
Development, validation and audit of financial, risk, marketing and business-oriented models
R&D projects




Requirements:




Recent graduates or final year students.
Should desirably have knowledge of Artificial Intelligence modeling techniques (logit, GLM, time series, random forests, clustering, XGBoost), statistical programming languages (SAS, R, Python, Matlab), big data tools and platforms (Hadoop, Hive, etc.) and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).
Solid academic record.
Strong computer skills.
Postgraduate studies and/or specialized courses are an asset, especially in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Quantitative Finance or similar.
Knowledge of other languages is desirable.
Get-up-and-go attitude, maturity, responsibility and strong work ethic.
Strong ability to learn quickly.
Able to integrate easily into multidisciplinary teams.




What we offer:




We offer you the possibility to join a firm that provides all you need to develop your talent to the fullest:




Working in the highest-profile consulting projects in the industry,
for the largest companies, leaders of their respective markets,
alongside top industry management as they face challenges at the national and global level,
as part of an extraordinary team of professionals whose values and corporate culture are a benchmark for the industry




Training:

Ongoing training plan, with approximately 10% of business turnover spent on training.
Specialist knowledge courses, external expert courses, professional skills courses and language courses.
Last year our staff as a whole received over 400,000 hours of training spanning more than 160 courses.




Career plan:

Clearly defined career plan.
Internal promotion based solely on merit.
Partnership-based management model offers all professionals the opportunity to become part of the Firm’s group of partners




Complementary experiences:




University: we maintain a close relationship with the world’s most prestigious universities.
Social Action: we organize more than 30 community support activities.
Sports Club: internal and external tournaments.




How to apply:




If you are interested in our offer, please complete our application form online at https://www.managementsolutions.com/en/professional-careers-send-us-your-cv

Title: Open Talent Pool - all DHI locations
Place: Hørsholm, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
At DHI, water, environment and sustainability meet innovation. Join us in enabling a sustainable future for water!

Looking to make an impact on our planet? At DHI, you can. We work with water in all its forms – combining deep domain knowledge, advanced digital technology, and more than 60 years of research and innovation to help society use, manage and live with water sustainably. With over 1,100 engineers and specialists across 26 countries, we are continually expanding our global community of experts.

As we grow, new opportunities emerge throughout the year. Even when a specific vacancy isn’t yet published, we welcome proactive applications from individuals who want to contribute to our mission – including senior specialist with years of experience or students, recent graduates and early career professionals who are excited to build their future in the water sector.

Why submit an open application?

Our business evolves quickly, and new roles – technical, scientific, digital and business-oriented – are created as projects grow and priorities shift. Submitting an open application adds you to our Open Talent Pool, enabling us to reach out when a suitable opportunity arises, often before it is advertised.

Before you submit your open application, please make sure to check our current vacancies as well.

Opportunities for Students & Early Career Talent

We strongly encourage students and early career professionals to apply.

At DHI, You Can


Join as an intern, student assistant, thesis collaboration partner or industry master program student
Contribute to global water projects alongside experienced specialists
Apply your academic knowledge to real-world environmental and digital challenges
Grow your skills in engineering, modelling, climate resilience, data science, software development, sustainability and more
Work in a culture that supports experimentation, learning and exploration


If you are studying or recently graduated in engineering, environmental science, climate studies, digital technology, or related fields – and want to help shape a sustainable future – your application is very welcome.

Profiles we are interested in

We invite applications from experienced professionals, graduates, and students with interest or expertise in:


Engineering & Environmental Science Coastal, marine, environmental, hydraulic, climate, civil, ecosystem modelling
Data, Digital & Technology Software development, data science, machine learning, AI, digital product development
Consulting & Project Delivery Advisory services, modelling, client engagement, project/programme management
Sustainability & ESG
Corporate Functions Legal, compliance, HR, finance, operations, commercial roles


We value cross disciplinary thinkers—if your background doesn’t fit into a category, we still encourage you to apply.

What We Offer

When you join DHI, you are empowered to be an explorer—to innovate, collaborate, and continuously learn. You’ll be part of a global organisation committed to protecting water ecosystems and developing sustainable solutions for communities, cities, industries and the planet.

Positions May Be


Fulltime or parttime
Based in various global locations or open to flexible arrangements
Project based or permanent, depending on organisational needs


How To Apply


Please submit your application through our careers page under “Open Talent”. If you are interested in other locations, please indicate that clearly.


Kindly Attach


Your CV
A brief note outlining your area of interests, skills and how you found DHI
List your preferred DHI location(s)
Links to portfolio, publications, or project work (optional)


Learn more about DHI www.dhigroup.com

At DHI, water, environment and sustainability meet innovation. Join us in enabling a sustainable future for water!

Looking to make an impact on our planet? At DHI, you can. We work with water in all its forms – combining deep domain knowledge, advanced digital technology, and more than 60 years of research and innovation to help society use, manage and live with water sustainably. With over 1,100 engineers and specialists across 26 countries, we are continually expanding our global community of experts.

As we grow, new opportunities emerge throughout the year. Even when a specific vacancy isn’t yet published, we welcome proactive applications from individuals who want to contribute to our mission – including senior specialist with years of experience or students, recent graduates and early career professionals who are excited to build their future in the water sector.

Why submit an open application?

Our business evolves quickly, and new roles – technical, scientific, digital and business-oriented – are created as projects grow and priorities shift. Submitting an open application adds you to our Open Talent Pool, enabling us to reach out when a suitable opportunity arises, often before it is advertised.

Before you submit your open application, please make sure to check our current vacancies as well.

Opportunities for Students & Early Career Talent

We strongly encourage students and early career professionals to apply.

At DHI, You Can

  • Join as an intern, student assistant, thesis collaboration partner or industry master program student
  • Contribute to global water projects alongside experienced specialists
  • Apply your academic knowledge to real-world environmental and digital challenges
  • Grow your skills in engineering, modelling, climate resilience, data science, software development, sustainability and more
  • Work in a culture that supports experimentation, learning and exploration

If you are studying or recently graduated in engineering, environmental science, climate studies, digital technology, or related fields – and want to help shape a sustainable future – your application is very welcome.

Profiles we are interested in

We invite applications from experienced professionals, graduates, and students with interest or expertise in:

  • Engineering & Environmental Science Coastal, marine, environmental, hydraulic, climate, civil, ecosystem modelling
  • Data, Digital & Technology Software development, data science, machine learning, AI, digital product development
  • Consulting & Project Delivery Advisory services, modelling, client engagement, project/programme management
  • Sustainability & ESG
  • Corporate Functions Legal, compliance, HR, finance, operations, commercial roles

We value cross disciplinary thinkers—if your background doesn’t fit into a category, we still encourage you to apply.

What We Offer

When you join DHI, you are empowered to be an explorer—to innovate, collaborate, and continuously learn. You’ll be part of a global organisation committed to protecting water ecosystems and developing sustainable solutions for communities, cities, industries and the planet.

Positions May Be

  • Fulltime or parttime
  • Based in various global locations or open to flexible arrangements
  • Project based or permanent, depending on organisational needs

How To Apply

  • Please submit your application through our careers page under “Open Talent”. If you are interested in other locations, please indicate that clearly.

Kindly Attach

  • Your CV
  • A brief note outlining your area of interests, skills and how you found DHI
  • List your preferred DHI location(s)
  • Links to portfolio, publications, or project work (optional)

Learn more about DHI www.dhigroup.com

Title: Customer Experience & Support Specialist
Place: Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
Elbiler er nøglen til den grønne omstilling – og hos enkel gør vi det til virkelighed.

Vi er en teknologidrevet el-leverandør, der aktivt bruger elbilers batterier som en del af elnettet. Det betyder smartere opladning, lavere priser og grønnere strøm – helt automatisk for brugeren.

Vi søger nu en Customer Experience & Support Specialist, der tager kundernes tillid personligt – og som tror på, at god kundeservice kan være mere menneskelig, mere engagerende og faktisk gøre en reel forskel for kunderne.




Opgaverne er varierede og består primært af daglig kundekommunikation, hvor overblik, nysgerrighed og evnen til at lytte er vigtige. Du har ansvar for dialogen med kunderne og for, at deres oplevelse af virksomheden matcher den kvalitet og omtanke, vi selv lægger i arbejdet.




Dine opgaver:

At svare på og formulere klar og præcis kommunikation til kunder via mail og telefon
At udarbejde fælles kundebeskeder, opdateringer og forklaringer, som mennesker faktisk forstår
At bidrage til vores kommunikation på sociale medier
At opsamle feedback og mønstre fra kundedialogen og dele dem internt, så vi løbende kan forbedre produkter, flows og kommunikation




Vi forestiller os, at du:

Har flair for at kommunikere klart, imødekommende og engagerende – både skriftligt og mundtligt
Er god til at lytte til kunder og forstå, hvad de egentlig har brug for hjælp til
Har en naturlig interesse for kunder, kommunikation og oplevelsen omkring et produkt – også på sociale kanaler og i CRM
Har det fint med at tage ansvar og selv finde den bedste løsning

·       Gerne vil gøre tingene lidt bedre, i stedet for bare at gøre dem “som vi plejer”

Du får:

Reelt ansvar – du har tillid og handlerum i den daglige kundekontakt
Indflydelse – dine observationer og input fra kunderne bliver taget seriøst og brugt
Tæt sparring – du arbejder tæt sammen med kolleger, der hjælper hinanden og deler viden
Meningsfuldt arbejde – dit arbejde er med til at gøre grøn energi mere forståelig og tilgængelig for rigtige mennesker
Udvikling – plads til at vokse i rollen og tage mere ansvar, når du er klar




Hos Enkel tror vi på, at energibranchen kan gøres mere enkel, mere ærlig og mere menneskelig. Hos os bliver du en del af en virksomhed i vækst, hvor ansvar og tillid går hånd i hånd, og hvor du er tæt på både de beslutninger, der bliver taget, og det arbejde, der bliver gjort.




Vi ved, at dygtige kandidater kan komme fra mange forskellige baggrunde, og vi opfordrer alle til at søge. Det vigtigste er, at du har lysten til at engagere dig i kunderne, tage ejerskab for dialogen og være med til at forme, hvordan god kundeservice ser ud hos os.

Title: Healthcare AI Startups Lead - EMEA
Place: Denmark
Description:
We are seeking a passionate and driven Healthcare Life Science (HCLS) UK, France, Nordics Startup Lead to build and scale NVIDIA’s developer ecosystem across UK, France and the Nordics. Today, over 4,500 healthcare life science startups participate in NVIDIA’s Inception program and these regions are a critical region in continuing to grow participation and engagement with HCLS startup community.

What You’ll Be Doing


Engage the HCLS AI Startup Community in the UK, France, and the Nordics - Build and scale programs that connect regional HCLS startups to NVIDIA technologies, building from NVIDIA’s Inception programs, regional hubs, accelerators, and events efficiently at scale.
Engage regional Venture Capital firms and funding entities at scale - Extend NVIDIA programs to regional VCs and other HCLS AI investors, engaging them to scale and accelerate adoption of NVIDIA technology to startups.
Drive Regional Strategy, Execution, and Operational Excellence - Develop and execute regional strategies; define and track operational metrics to continuously improve startup and VC engagement at scale.
Act as Regional Interface and SME - Serve as NVIDIA’s subject matter expert and main interface for the HCLS startup ecosystem in the UK, France and the Nordics, surfacing feedback and ensuring alignment with global teams.
Ability to navigate fast-moving startup ecosystems, understands how to engage the HCLS startup community in the UK, France, and Nordic regions, including VCs and accelerators, and brings the creativity and intensity to lead teams, engage founders, and scale developer impact across the region.


What We Need To See


12 years + of experience in developing and delivering startup engagement programs at scale, developer relations, business development, or startup ecosystems
Bachelors in a related degree of equivalent experience.
Deep understanding of [EMEA] HCLS startup and VC communities
Track record of building and scaling developer or startup engagement programs
Strong communication and program management skills


Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd


Knowledge of AI, machine learning, or HPC technologies
Experience with regional VC, incubator hub, etc
Familiarity with region’s major startup hubs (UK, France, Nordics)


NVIDIA Is At The Forefront Of AI And Accelerated Computing, Widely Regarded As One Of The Most Innovative Companies In Technology. You Will Have The Opportunity To


Work with ground breaking technology crafting the future of AI and startups
Build communities and programs that empower thousands of developers
Collaborate in a culture that values creativity, autonomy, and impact


We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Klipning af jern og metal med Lefort 600
Pålæsning af lastbiler
Generel håndtering af skrot og materialer på pladsen

Har en god forståelse for maskiner og kan udføre lettere vedligehold
Passer godt på materiel og arbejder ansvarligt
Kan samarbejde med andre maskinførere

Kan arbejde selvstændigt og samtidig indgå i et team

Viden om jern og metal er et plus – men ikke et krav.

Fast arbejde i en solid virksomhed
Gode arbejdsforhold og ordnede forhold
Pension

Livøvej 2, 8940 Randers SV

Mandag – torsdag: 07:00 – 16:00
Fredag: 07:00 – 14:00

Title: Freelance Data Scraping Engineer (Python)
Place: Denmark
Description:
Mindrift is looking for highly skilled Python Data Scraping Engineers to join the Tendem project and drive specialized data scraping workflows within our hybrid AI + human system.

In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this role at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide critical thinking, domain expertise, and quality control to deliver accurate and actionable results.

This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for technical professionals with hands-on experience in web scraping, data extraction and processing.

What We Do

The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe.

About The Role

This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Python Data Scraping Engineer, you'll handle data scraping tasks requiring technical precision for web extraction and processing, utilizing various tools such as our provided Apify and OpenRouter alongside your own resourceful approaches.

Key Responsibilities


Own end-to-end data extraction workflows across complex websites, ensuring complete coverage, accuracy, and reliable delivery of structured datasets.
Leverage internal tools (Apify, OpenRouter) alongside custom workflows to accelerate data collection, validation, and task execution while meeting defined requirements.
Ensure reliable extraction from dynamic and interactive web sources, adapting approaches as needed to handle JavaScript-rendered content and changing site behavior.
Enforce data quality standards through validation checks, cross-source consistency controls, adherence to formatting specifications, and systematic verification prior to delivery.
Scale scraping operations for large datasets using efficient batching or parallelization, monitor failures, and maintain stability against minor site structure changes


Compensation

On this project, contributors can earn up to $32 per hour equivalent, depending on their level and pace of contribution.

Compensation varies across projects depending on scope, complexity, and required expertise. Please note that other projects on the platform may offer different earning levels based on their requirements.

How To Get Started

Simply apply to this post, qualify, and get the chance to contribute to projects that match your technical skills, on your own schedule. From coding and automation to fine-tuning AI outputs, you'll play a key role in advancing AI capabilities and real-world applications.

Requirements


At least 3 year of relevant experience in data engineering, web scraping, automation, or software development (required).
Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Computer Science, or related technical fields is a plus
Strong experience in Python web scraping (BeautifulSoup, Selenium or similar), including dynamic content (JS, AJAX, infinite scroll) and APIs via proxies
Proven ability to extract data from complex structures (hierarchies, archived pages, inconsistent HTML)
Solid background in data cleaning, normalization, and validation, delivering structured datasets (CSV, JSON, Google Sheets)
Hands-on experience with LLMs and AI frameworks to enhance automation and problem-solving
Strong attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy
Self-directed work ethic with ability to troubleshoot independently
A link to GitHub is a plus
English proficiency: Upper-intermediate (B2) or above (required)


Benefits

Why this freelance opportunity might be a great fit for you?


Work fully remote on your own schedule with just a laptop and stable internet connection.
Gain hands-on experience in a unique hybrid environment where human expertise and AI agents collaborate seamlessly — a distinctive skill set in a rapidly growing field.
Participate in performance-based bonus programs that reward high-quality work and consistent delivery

Title: Gaffeltruckfører
Place: Vejen, Region of Southern Denmark, Denmark
Description:
🦅 Er du en ørn i en gaffeltruck?




Hos Niels Pagh Logistics i Vejen søger vi nye kræfter, der er i deres rette element bag rattet og kan placere gaflerne med millimeterpræcision. Vi mangler faktisk to profiler til vores team i 6600 Vejen:




1. Den rutinerede gaffeltruckfører

Du har fuldstændig styr på af- og pålæsning af trailere. Du trives på terminalen og ved, at sikkerhed og effektivitet går hånd i hånd, når der er mange paller i luften.




2. Den tekniske kombi-mand (Gaffeltruck & Værksted)

Du er en ørn i en gaffeltruck, men du kan også svinge en skruenøgle. Når du ikke læsser biler, hjælper du til på værkstedet med service og småreparationer af vores lastbiler og trailere.




Hvad forventer vi af dig?

Du har gyldigt truckcertifikat og masser af erfaring.
Du er mødestabil og har en positiv indstilling.
Du kan arbejde selvstændigt og se, hvor der skal tages fat.



Hvorfor Niels Pagh Logistics?

Vi er en solid virksomhed med en uformel omgangstone og ordnede forhold. Vi har ikke brug for lange ansøgninger – vi vil hellere se, hvad du kan i praksis.




Interesseret?

Kig forbi os på Industrivej i Vejen til en kop kaffe og en uforpligtende snak, eller kontakt Flemming Kristensen direkte på 22270152.




Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig!

Title: Licensed Aircraft Engineer (Position based in Dubai, UAE)
Place: Copenhagen, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
About the Company - Emirates Engineering is currently seeking experienced Licensed Aircraft Engineers to join our team in Dubai. If you're looking for an exciting opportunity in a dynamic environment, this could be the perfect fit for you.







About the Role - As a Licensed Aircraft Engineer at Emirates Engineering, you will be responsible for carrying out routine maintenance tasks and defect rectification of aircraft in accordance with company and regulatory procedures. Key responsibilities include conducting aircraft maintenance and servicing tasks, ensuring compliance with safety and manufacturer procedures, and maintaining effective communication with colleagues and supervisors.




Responsibilities -







Perform aircraft maintenance and servicing tasks according to manufacturer and safety procedures.
Ensure assigned zones/aircraft are maintained as per the latest revisions of approved technical publications.
Handle off-aircraft tasks such as spares handling and documentation in compliance with company procedures.
Determine and use appropriate tooling/equipment for tasks, ensuring cost-effective and efficient troubleshooting.
Carry out component changes as necessary, following AMM, IPC, or manufacturer documentation.
Adhere to safety rules and regulations, maintain excellent housekeeping conditions, and report any deficiencies.
Communicate effectively with colleagues, managers, and senior engineers to highlight operational issues and ensure seamless information flow.
Complete detailed reports on service delays, incidents, and accidents to facilitate maintenance planning and improvement.
Manage staff performance through performance reviews, goal setting, and development plans.
Attend training modules as required to enhance skills and comply with CAR 145 requirements.







Qualifications - Bachelor's degree or equivalent (apprenticeship) in Engineering. Minimum 5 years of experience in engineering as a certifying staff.




About Emirates - At Emirates, we're committed to providing our employees with opportunities to grow and develop in their careers. If you're looking for a challenging and rewarding opportunity in aircraft engineering, apply today for our Licensed Aircraft Engineer role!

Title: Senior Data Scientist (R&D) - Enterprise Business Development
Place: Hedehusene, Capital Region of Denmark, Denmark
Description:
Job Req Number: 113207

Time Type: Full Time

Do you want to push the boundaries of AI and scale it to users across the world? Do you thrive in a product-centric environment where AI and analytics drive action – not just insight?

With a strong focus on data science and engineering, you will contribute to the innovation, insight and maturation of both new and existing products. You will join a team of highly skilled data scientists and researchers, working closely with cross-functional product teams consisting of product owners, backend and frontend developers, as well as MLOps and DevSecOps specialists. In this role, you will help drive our data science agenda, with the ambition to build, scale and continuously evolve next-generation ML systems.

About the team: Join a department focused on our most valuable digital products

You will join Enterprise Business Development, specifically our AI Research & Centre of Excellence, characterized by a strong intrapreneurial mindset. The unit collaborates closely with established MLOps, DevSecOps, and Data Science teams that have operated machine learning systems in production at global scale for several years. We work in a culture where decisions are driven by knowledge, dialogue, and diverse perspectives rather than hierarchy, and where outcomes are shaped through collaboration across competencies.

Examples of what we have worked on in 2025 and 2026 so far:



Data-driven prompt optimization
Custom RAG solutions for Intelligent Document Processing
LLM based multi-stage inference flows
Multi-modal model input and representations



Current and ongoing plans set for 2026:



Establish industrial research focus by driving research-based project work and collaboration with academic research institutions, including publishing our work in relevant ML journals/conferences
Advanced Context Engineering
Planning and forming our journey into Agentic AI based methods when applicable (ex. Tool calling and Agentic Memory, Agentic Search, Agentic Event based Flows)
Generally: Become creators – not consumers – of Agentic AI and multimodal machine learning.
And more



About the role: Drive our AI, ML and Agentic AI journey

As a Senior Data Scientist, you will have a broad and impactful role. Your work will include developing reusable packages and core contributions to our machine learning platforms, while ensuring strong adoption across squads and verticals, directly influencing downstream products used across DSV’s divisions. You will operate with a high degree of autonomy, while also collaborating closely in project‑based teams. You will contribute to and help lead our AI and Agentic AI, in close alignment with AI research initiatives.

Key responsibilities:



Advance multimodal and agentic GenAI: Take ownership of applying GenAI, Agentic AI and multimodal ML, covering image, layout, and language/text modeling.
Drive AI innovation in DSV’s products: Lead cross-project innovation to solve complex, real-world challenges and translate insights into measurable improvements in ML system performance and outcomes.
Foundational model development: Architect, train, and evaluate foundational models independently, with a strong focus on LLMs and multimodal systems relevant to DSV’s business domains.
Knowledge sharing and continuous learning: Stay at the forefront of AI and ML developments and actively contribute to knowledge sharing across DSV’s data science community



About you: You thrive when solving highly complex challenges

The use cases we work with are highly complex and typically require non-deterministic problem-solving using ML and AI, large-scale data processing, high availability, and both vertical and horizontal scalability, often at very high transaction volumes.

To succeed, you bring an open and analytical mindset, balancing theoretical approaches with pragmatic solutions grounded in what is technically and operationally feasible.

Skills and experience we value and would love you to bring to the role:



Educational background: Preferably a PhD or master's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Machine Learning, or a related field.
Strong theoretical foundation: A solid foundation in mathematics, statistics, and algorithms to implement research ideas, build upon existing research to create new solutions, and adapt established work to our domain.
Software development: A comprehensive understanding of core programming and development concepts, including data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming. You will both prototype rapidly and contribute to large, collaborative, long-lived machine learning codebases. We primarily use Python due to the high availability of machine learning frameworks.
Design thinking and engineering mindset: Comfortable applying design thinking from the outset and continuously questioning existing design choices. You proactively raise issues and refactor early where needed.
Model development and architecture: Proficiency in building systems from scratch, as well as modifying and optimizing existing advanced AI systems, particularly for agentic, multimodal applications.
Accelerated and distributed computing: Proficiency in accelerated and non-accelerated parallel computing, including scalable data processing and leveraging GPU/AI-Accelerator technologies for enhanced performance and model-training scalability. We use frameworks such as: PyTorch, Kedro, Apache Beam, and more.
Continuous learning: A strong commitment to staying current with the latest advancements in machine learning and applying academic insights to solve complex business challenges.
Practical large-scale experience: Hands-on experience with large-scale, real-world machine learning projects - ideally solutions that go beyond notebook-based experimentation.
Self-starter & ownership: A proactive mindset with the ability to take initiative and drive work independently, while benefitting from guidance and supervision. You are comfortable owning objectives and pushing them forward end to end.



We understand that no candidate may meet every single requirement listed here. If you meet some – but not all – of the qualifications we still encourage you to apply. We are looking for passionate individuals who are eager to grow, learn and contribute meaningfully to our team.

What we offer:



Direct communication: You will engage directly with VP- and C-level stakeholders, ensuring your insights and contributions are heard at the highest levels.
Global-scale experience: Leverage our proven experience with Machine learning systems in production at global scale, including both development and operational excellence for large-scale ML solutions.
A proven team: Join a team that is already self-financed, based on realized and measurable returns from machine learning business cases.
AI Research and Center of Excellence (AICoE): Be part of our AI initiative, where you can actively influence methodologies, strategic direction, and the research agenda.
Influence on tooling and MLOps: Contribute to key technical decisions and have direct influence on the evolution of our robust, in-house MLOps platform, working closely with a growing and highly skilled MLOps team supporting our shared AI mission.



Ready to move to the next step?

We accept applications until 31 May 2026, but we screen candidates on an ongoing basis, so we recommend applying early. No cover letter needed; just include a short motivation in your CV.

If you would like to know more about the role, you are welcome to Head of AI Research and Centre of Excellence (AICoE) Rasmus Kær Jørgensen at +45 25452587.

DSV – Global transport and logistics

At arbejde hos DSV betyder at spille i en helt anden liga.

Som en global leder inden for transport og logistik har vi været på en ekstraordinær vækstrejse. Lad os vokse sammen, mens vi fortsætter med at innovere, digitalisere og bygge videre på vores præstationer.

Med tæt på 150.000 kolleger i over 90 lande arbejder vi hver dag på at tilbyde solide tjenester og imødekomme vores kunders behov og hjælpe dem med at nå deres mål. Vi ved, at den bedste måde at opnå dette på er ved at tiltrække nye talenter, friske perspektiver og ambitiøse individer som dig.

Hos DSV ligger præstation i vores DNA. Vi arbejder ikke bare – vi sigter mod at forme fremtidens logistik. Denne ambition fremmer et dynamisk miljø bygget på samarbejde med teamspillere i verdensklasse, ansvarlighed og handling. Vi værdsætter inklusion, omfavner forskellige kulturer og respekterer hvert enkelt individs værdighed og rettigheder. Hvis du vil gøre en forskel, få kundernes tillid og udvikle din karriere i en fremsynet virksomhed – er dette stedet at være.

Start here. Go anywhere
